description: Cross-language conformance for the NZB engine. Each case parses an NZB document and pins the server-free health summary plus the streaming retrieval order (content articles first in segment-number order, par2 repair articles deferred to the tail). Every platform's NZB parser + policy must agree byte-for-byte so the app and the federation worker plan identically.

cases.name: healthy_content_plus_par2
cases.xml: <nzb><file subject="movie.mkv (1/2)"><segments><segment bytes="500" number="1">a@news</segment><segment bytes="400" number="2">b@news</segment></segments></file><file subject="movie.vol00+1.par2 (1/1)"><segments><segment bytes="100" number="1">p@news</segment></segments></file></nzb>
